title: Drug case at Sira PS
narrative: On 2025-05-28, a case of drug was reported at Sira PS, Tumakuru district. Ganja seizure at Jayanagar 4th Block. 43kg of marijuana recovered from a goods vehicle. Two suspects arrested. The investigating team identified 2 suspect(s): Suresh Shetty, Mahesh Madiwalar. The modus operandi observed was: Campus-based micro-distribution through student networks. The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 3 prior cases in the Tumakuru area. The case has been resolved and chargesheeted.
modus_operandi: Campus-based micro-distribution through student networks
evidence_summary: 1. FIR registered at Sira PS. 2. 5 witness statements collected. 3. Forensic evidence collected. 4. Vehicle tracking in progress
investigating_officer: PSI Mahesh Madiwalar, Sira PS

The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 2 prior cases in the Belagavi area. The case has been resolved and chargesheeted.

title: Cybercrime case at Khanapur PS
narrative: On 2025-02-06, a case of cybercrime was reported at Khanapur PS, Belagavi district. Ransomware attack on KR Market business. Systems encrypted, attackers demanded ₹4,09,000 in cryptocurrency. The investigating team identified 1 suspect(s): Meena Hiremath. The modus operandi observed was: Fake investment app with initial real returns to build trust before large fraud. The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 2 prior cases in the Belagavi area. The case has been resolved and chargesheeted.

Investigation revealed connections to 2 prior cases in the Kalaburagi area. The case has been resolved and chargesheeted.
